name: Persona 3 RP
description:
This is a Persona 3 RP. I have tried to give the bot plenty of information to make it as immersive as possible, though if issues arise tell me. USE THE CHAT SUMMARY FORMAT BELOW, IF YOU DON’T THEN IMPORTANT PLOT POINTS WILL BE FORGOTTEN

Chat summary format:

{{user}} info:

[name,

appearance including approximate weight and height,

current outfit]

{{user}} backstory:

[important backstory about your character such as how they arrived, anything they’ve established while here, etc.]

Relationships:

[Ex. Mitsuru and {{user}}- Close friends, have shared many important moments together.]

Plot developments:

[Alternatively change to story summary, but bullet important plot points in chronological order.]

Author Notes

This bot is trusted with a lot as I don’t have a lore book for it, and I left the story open ended, however I have put a lot of instructions to try my best to maximize immersion. Should any problems or issues occur, please leave it in the reviews so I can correct them. If you don’t use the summary expect very very poor results.
creator: Lionhitch
